channel.title: Postgresql on Louis LIN's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Postgresql on Louis LIN's blog

item.title: Remove idle transactions
item.description:
SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) 
FROM pg_stat_activity 
WHERE state LIKE 'idle %' 
AND state_change < now() - interval '1 hour';

item.title: How to link old and new IDs when migrating data from one table to another
item.description:
When proceeding a database migration, I often had to create a temporary table that will contains the data from the old database.

However, after the migration, I still need to have links between the old IDs and the new IDs for various post migration operation.

This post is about creating the table containing the linked ids.

item.title: Do not prompt password and enable remote access
item.description: Do not prompt password Edit the file /etc/postgresql/9.3/main/pg_hba.conf and change the value from peer to trust: # "local" is for Unix domain socket connections only local all postgres trust # IPv4 local connections: host all all 0.0.0.0/0 trust Restart the PostgreSQL service: sudo service postgresql restart Enable remote access Edit the file /etc/postgresql/9.3/main/postgresql.confand look for the property listen_addresses and change its value to '*': listen_addresses = '*' Restart the PostgreSQL service:
